name: UCI Heart Disease Cleveland
description: Structured patient records from the published UCI Cleveland heart disease dataset used to evaluate a binary heart disease prediction model.
source: UCI Machine Learning Repository Heart Disease dataset (Cleveland subset)
notes: The dataset is filtered to complete cases.
The original diagnosis target is binarized so num == 0 maps to 0 and num in {1,2,3,4} maps to 1.
The backend uses the saved holdout split in test_set.csv for runtime analysis.
